hitl.name: Jordan Rivera
hitl.context: Runs a gummy manufacturing operation. Manages supplier relationships, retail/brand partnerships, compliance, and production scheduling.

senders.name: Steve White
senders.context: Supplies bulk ingredients (gelatin, sweeteners, flavoring, cocoa) to Acme Confections. Long-standing supplier relationship. Reliable but occasionally has supply chain issues.

senders.name: Bob Johnson
senders.context: White-label CPG brand that buys finished gummy products from Acme Confections for retail distribution. Demands quality, consistency, and on-time delivery. Growing account.
